VAULTS.Settings.Url.Name: Vault URL
VAULTS.Settings.Url.Hint: The base URL of your deployed vault, e.g. https://my-vault.pages.dev. Leave blank and use Connect to set it interactively.
VAULTS.Settings.Token.Name: Auth Token
VAULTS.Settings.Token.Hint: Bearer token for protected vaults. Set automatically by the Connect flow — don't edit by hand.
VAULTS.Settings.RootFolder.Name: Root Folder
VAULTS.Settings.RootFolder.Hint: Name of the top-level Foundry journal folder to import into.
VAULTS.Settings.LastManifest.Name: Last Manifest
VAULTS.Sync.NothingToDo: Vault is already up to date.
VAULTS.Sync.NoUrl: Configure a vault URL or run Connect first.
VAULTS.Dialog.Title: Sync Vault
VAULTS.Dialog.Status.NotConnected: Not connected. Enter your vault URL and click Connect.
VAULTS.Dialog.Status.NoUrl: No vault URL configured. Set one above.
